productName: Collections - T2 - Hash Rosin - Baby Diesel - (DOH) - 1g
description: A purist's hybrid hash rosin: Baby Diesel refined first into full-melt hash, then squeezed solventless under heat and pressure for the cleanest, most flavorful dab going. Maximum flavor, zero solvents, a pungent diesel and fuel flavor, and a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
